name: treatment-page
description: A branching SEO page builder. Researches a veterinary treatment, then branches on whether pet insurance is relevant before writing and SEO-checking the page.

steps.instruction:
Research the {treatment} for {animal}: what it is, when it's needed,
typical cost ranges, and what pet owners worry about.
steps.title: Research

steps.instruction:
Pull the search demand for '{treatment} {animal}' from DataForSEO: head term,
long-tail variants, and the questions people actually ask. This shapes the
title, headings, and FAQ downstream.
steps.title: Keyword Research

steps.instruction:
Decide whether pet insurance meaningfully affects how an owner approaches
{treatment}. True if it's expensive, elective-adjacent, or commonly claimed.
steps.title: Insurance Relevant

steps.instruction:
Compare how the major pet insurers cover {treatment} for {animal}:
what's included, typical excess, and any waiting periods.
steps.title: Compare Insurers

steps.instruction:
Write the {treatment} page for {animal} owners using {research}.
If an {insurance_table} exists, weave it in as a dedicated section.
steps.title: Write Page

steps.instruction:
Audit {page} for SEO: title tag, meta description, heading hierarchy,
internal links, and the target keyword '{treatment} {animal}'.
steps.title: Seo Check
